_meta_format: flat JSON object — each entry is a top-level string key -> localized value. UTF-8, no BOM required (loader strips one if present). Variable placeholders are {UPPER_SNAKE}; keep them verbatim in translations.
LEVEL_UP_FLAVOR_PLUCKY: You feel pluckier. Choose your gift.
LEVEL_UP_EVOLVE: Two gifts want to become one. Pick the pair.
RUN_END_LOSE_GENERIC: Tuckered out — but you banked {GOLD} carrots.
HERO_REVIVE_PROMPT: Bunny got knocked silly. Want a quick nap and one more try?
DAILY_STREAK_HOOK: Three days running. Sturdy little adventurer.
WAVE_INCOMING: Heads up — more rascals on the way.
BIOME_INTRO_MEADOW: Sunny patch. Bunny pops out, ears up, ready to hop.
BIOME_INTRO_BEACH: Warm sand, salt in the air, and a crab who looks very busy.
BIOME_INTRO_FOREST: Cool shade, leaves whispering. Mind your step under the canopy.
BIOME_INTRO_CAVERN: Glow-mushrooms light the way. Someone's been down here already.
BIOME_INTRO_SNOW: Soft drifts, quiet hills. Footprints lead off toward the pines.
BOSS_INTRO_BOAR: Old Boar's awake. Mind your tail.
BOSS_INTRO_CRAB: Crab Captain's on shore patrol. Watch the pincer.
BOSS_INTRO_OAK: Mama Oak's roots are up. Step lightly.
BOSS_INTRO_MOLE: Cave Mole's in the floor. Listen for the rumble.
BOSS_INTRO_YETI: Big Snow-yeti's grumpy. Keep your paws warm.
IAP_BATTLE_PASS_PROMPT: Want to add the Pass for {PRICE}?
IAP_BATTLE_PASS_BENEFIT: Extra weekly carrots and a cosmetic ribbon.
IAP_GIFT_BANNER: A friendly sponsor sent you a gift.
AD_REVIVE_PROMPT: Watch a quick ad to hop back in?
AD_DOUBLE_REWARD_PROMPT: Watch a quick ad to double your carrots?
AD_OPT_OUT_HINT: You can turn ads off in Settings.
STORE_PURCHASE_FAIL: Something hiccupped. Please try again in a moment.
menu.title: Brave Bunny
levelup.title: Level up!
loadout.title: Pick your hero.
settings.title: Settings
pause.title: Catch your breath.
pause.confirm_quit_body: You keep every carrot you've banked so far.
tutorial.move: Slide your thumb to hop around.
tutorial.attack: Bunny attacks on her own. Keep her safe.
tutorial.pickup_xp: Walk over the sparkles to grow stronger.
tutorial.levelup: Pick a gift to shape your run.
tutorial.boss: Watch the telegraph. Step out of the splash.
tutorial.pause_hint: Need a breather? Tap the pause button.
errors.network_offline: No connection. Trying again in a moment.
errors.save_corrupted: Your save file got tangled. We started a fresh one and stashed a copy.
errors.save_failed: Couldn't save just now. We'll try again soon.
errors.store_unavailable: The shop is taking a nap. Try again in a moment.
errors.ads_unavailable: No ads available right now. Try again later.
errors.unknown: Something unexpected happened. We logged it.
characters.bunny.name: Bunny
characters.bunny.bio: The brave little neighbor who'd rather hop into trouble than wait at home.
characters.tortoise.name: Tortoise
characters.tortoise.bio: The calm old friend who turns up when things get a little rowdy.
characters.fox.name: Fox
characters.fox.bio: The quick-witted one who lands the sharpest hit and the driest joke.
characters.hedgehog.name: Hedgehog
characters.hedgehog.bio: The small, prickly friend who proves that close-up is a fine place to stand.
characters.otter.name: Otter
characters.otter.bio: The splashy showoff who never throws one pebble when three will do.
characters.panda.name: Panda
characters.panda.bio: The soft-spoken friend who always seems to have a snack and a kind word ready.
characters.badger.name: Badger
characters.badger.bio: The practical neighbor who never goes anywhere without two helpers and a plan.
characters.owl.name: Owl
characters.owl.bio: The patient watcher who notices everything and shares only what helps.
weapons.carrot-boomerang.name: Carrot Boomerang
weapons.carrot-boomerang.description: A whirling carrot that comes right back. Hits twice if you're lucky.
weapons.sunbeam.name: Sunbeam
weapons.sunbeam.description: A warm shaft of light that sweeps the nearest rascal off their paws.
weapons.daisy-mine.name: Daisy Mine
weapons.daisy-mine.description: A pretty flower that goes pop when stepped on.
weapons.pebble-sling.name: Pebble Sling
weapons.pebble-sling.description: A pocketful of stones, slung quick. Bounces if you train it right.
weapons.honey-aura.name: Honey Aura
weapons.honey-aura.description: A sticky golden cloud that slows trouble down and stings it sweetly.
weapons.acorn-cannon.name: Acorn Cannon
weapons.acorn-cannon.description: A heavy acorn from the back of the line. Slow, mean, and dependable.
weapons.thunder-cloud.name: Thunder Cloud
weapons.thunder-cloud.description: A grumpy little cloud that zaps anyone underneath.
weapons.frost-whisper.name: Frost Whisper
weapons.frost-whisper.description: A chilly hush that slows the rascals around you.
weapons.cob-mortar.name: Cob Mortar
weapons.cob-mortar.description: A high-arc cob that crashes down somewhere on screen. Watch the splash.
weapons.beehive.name: Beehive
weapons.beehive.description: Friendly bees orbit Bunny and dive on whoever gets close.
weapons.tumbleweed.name: Tumbleweed
weapons.tumbleweed.description: A bristly ball that rolls off in a random direction. Get out of its way.
weapons.whirligig.name: Whirligig
weapons.whirligig.description: A pair of paper blades that orbit close and slice anything that brushes by.
weapons.harvest-cyclone.name: Harvest Cyclone
weapons.harvest-cyclone.description: A whirlwind of carrots that pulls trouble in and shreds it.
weapons.solar-halo.name: Solar Halo
weapons.solar-halo.description: Twin beams that ring Bunny in sunlight.
weapons.meadow-bloom.name: Meadow Bloom
weapons.meadow-bloom.description: Flower-fields bloom where the mines burst.
weapons.stone-storm.name: Stone Storm
weapons.stone-storm.description: A shower of bouncing pebbles every time.
weapons.oak-thunderclap.name: Oak Thunderclap
weapons.oak-thunderclap.description: A massive acorn that thunders down with a wide splash.
weapons.cornfield-volley.name: Cornfield Volley
weapons.cornfield-volley.description: Three cobs at once, each leaving a smouldering patch.
weapons.honey-hug.name: Honey Hug
weapons.honey-hug.description: The aura turns kind — heals Bunny a little for every rascal it stings.
weapons.pinwheel-storm.name: Pinwheel Storm
weapons.pinwheel-storm.description: Eight whirligigs at every radius. Don't get close.
enemies.hop-slime.name: Hop-Slime
enemies.bee-buzz.name: Bee-Buzz
enemies.daisy-bite.name: Daisy-Bite
enemies.sleepy-boar.name: Sleepy Boar
enemies.archer-mole.name: Archer Mole
enemies.big-onion.name: Big Onion
enemies.old-boar-king.name: Old Boar King
weapons.storm-cloud.name: Storm Cloud
weapons.storm-cloud.description: An angrier cousin of the thunder cloud — four zaps and a longer fuse.
weapons.sapling-summon.name: Sapling Summon
weapons.sapling-summon.description: A friendly sprout that plants itself and pokes at rascals nearby.
weapons.maple-boomerang.name: Maple Boomerang
weapons.maple-boomerang.description: A spinning maple leaf — slices two rascals in a row on the way back.
weapons.sunflower-beam.name: Sunflower Beam
weapons.sunflower-beam.description: A focused golden ray from a tall sunflower that follows the trouble.
weapons.cherry-bomb.name: Cherry Bomb
weapons.cherry-bomb.description: A tossed cherry that pops with a sweet little splash.
weapons.wasp-swarm.name: Wasp Swarm
weapons.wasp-swarm.description: Three buzzy friends that circle Bunny and dive whenever trouble gets close.
enemies.crab.name: Crab
enemies.gull.name: Gull
enemies.sand-puff.name: Sand-Puff
enemies.mosquito.name: Mosquito
enemies.bog-boar.name: Bog Boar
enemies.throw-frog.name: Throw Frog
enemies.big-hermit-crab.name: Big Hermit Crab
enemies.bat-mini.name: Bat-Mini
enemies.glow-bug.name: Glow-Bug
enemies.rock-tumble.name: Rock-Tumble
enemies.cave-slime.name: Cave-Slime
enemies.stone-ox.name: Stone Ox
enemies.crystal-slinger.name: Crystal Slinger
enemies.stalagmite-walker.name: Stalagmite Walker
biomes.meadow.name: Sunny Meadow
biomes.meadow.description: A sunny patch where bunnies hop and rascals are small.
biomes.beach.name: Warm Beach
biomes.beach.description: Soft sand, salt in the air, and crabs who look very busy.
biomes.forest.name: Whispering Forest
biomes.forest.description: Cool shade and leaves that whisper. Watch your step under the canopy.
biomes.cave.name: Glowing Cavern
biomes.cave.description: Glow-mushrooms light the way. Listen for the rumble.
biomes.snow.name: Snow Hills
biomes.snow.description: Soft drifts and quiet hills. Keep your paws warm.
daily.title: Daily rewards
quest.title: Quests
quest.kill_enemies.title: Send {COUNT} rascals packing
quest.survive_waves.title: Clear {COUNT} waves
quest.defeat_boss.title: Knock the boss flat
quest.reach_level.title: Reach Lv {LEVEL}
quest.collect_gold.title: Bank {COUNT} carrots
quest.run_duration.title: Hop along for {MINUTES} minutes
battlepass.title: Bunny Pass
battlepass.premium_required: Pass holders only — grab the Pass to unlock.
shop.purchase_failed: Something hiccupped. Please try again in a moment.
